company_name: 公益社団法人北海道シルバー人材センター連合会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Silver Human Resources Center providing temporary/light work for elderly; senior part-time staffing, not headhunting.
notes: Official site confirmed at webc.sjc.ne.jp/doushiren/ via Dokobot read. Contact form found at inquiry_1, but no email address published on site. Company is a public interest foundation operating Silver HR Centers for senior temporary/part-time staffing.
